title: My Wanting Is Sacred
subtitle: An energy statement practice for releasing guilt about desiring wealth
excerpt: An energy statement practice for Day 15 of the money arc. Week 3 works with self-sabotage and scarcity thinking. These statements address the guilt layer underneath: the belief that wanting wealth is greedy, or that financial desire is a character flaw that needs to be hidden.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Built from the Day 15 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796): releasing guilt about wanting wealth.

practice.whenToUse: When financial desire comes wrapped in guilt — when wanting more money feels like something to be ashamed of rather than something clean and natural.

content.text: Energy statements for Day 15 of the money arc. Say each one aloud, slowly. These work with the belief that desire for wealth is a character flaw — and replace it with the straightforward fact that wanting is direction, not greed.
My wanting is not greed. It is direction.
I am allowed to want this much.
Desire is a signal, not a character flaw.
The size of my wanting reflects the size of what I'm building.
I give myself permission to want more — openly and without apology.
My wanting harms no one and serves everyone I love.
I no longer hide what I want.
Abundance is allowed. I am allowed.
Built from the Day 15 theme of
MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout
(Rebecca J Page, 2025): releasing guilt about wanting wealth.
